goal: Add provider selection to atelier init for OpenCode harness, restructure model registry to be provider-scoped, and maintain backward compatibility for Claude harness

tasks.name: Update src/models.ts with provider-scoped registry
tasks.description: Replace flat claudModels and opencodeModels arrays with provider-scoped registry. Add Provider type, providers map, providerModels map, and defaultModels keyed by provider.

tests: Default models exist in their provider's model list

tasks.name: Update src/types.ts to add provider to config
tasks.description: Add optional provider?: string field to AtelierConfig. Add Provider export. Ensure backward compatibility (provider optional, omitted for claude).

tests: AtelierConfig type-checks with and without provider
acceptance: Provider type is exported and usable

tasks.name: Update src/utils/templates.ts for provider-scoped queries
inputs: New providerModels and defaultModels from T1
tasks.description: Replace getModelsForHarness with getModelsForProvider. Replace getDefaultModel(harness, agent) with getDefaultModel(provider, agent). Keep getModelsForHarness as backward-compatible wrapper for claude.

tests: getModelsForProvider returns correct models for each provider
getDefaultModel returns correct defaults for each provider
acceptance: Existing tests pass or are updated

tasks.name: Update src/utils/config.ts for provider-aware defaults
tasks.description: Update getDefaultConfig to accept optional provider parameter. Use provider to look up defaults. Add readConfig validation for provider/harness consistency.

tasks.name: Update src/commands/init.ts with provider selection
tasks.description: Add provider selection prompt when harness is opencode and not --yes mode. Update --yes default to opencode-zen. Update all tests for provider flow.

tests: Interactive init for opencode prompts for provider
Provider selection shows correct model list

tasks.name: Update src/generators/opencode.ts with provider hints
tasks.description: Optional: When generating opencode.json for amazon-bedrock, include config hints for region/profile setup.

acceptance: Optional enhancement, can be skipped if complex
